title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited!
